implemented.right_sidebar: focused fish inspector and compare mode
implemented.below_puddle: narrator, lifecycle dashboard, lineage/policy/teaching observatory, timeline, diagnostics
implemented.narrator: deterministic rule-based summary grounded in telemetry

known_limitations: Timeline filtering is not interactive yet.
Compare mode uses visible state and proximity hints only.
